markdownRemark.excerpt: Right-click on “My Computer”, then click “Manage” Click on “Device Manager” Click on “View > Show hidden Devices” Click on “Non-Plug and Play Drivers”. Then…
markdownRemark.html:
1. Right-click on “My Computer”, then click “Manage”
  2. Click on “Device Manager”
  3. Click on “View > Show hidden Devices”
  4. Click on “Non-Plug and Play Drivers”. Then right-click on “Beep” and choose “disable”.
  5. Restart

Source: yorkspace.com - see the comments

frontmatter.title: Turning off the beep on a Dell Latitude D620
